visual_assets.status: AI-assisted original drafts with manual cleanup
visual_assets.license: MIT; project-owned AI-assisted original assets with process disclosed in wiki/assets.md

generated_key_art.human_cleanup: 16:9 crop, palette adjustment, optimized desktop PNG and web WebP derivatives
generated_key_art.runtime_status: Retired after hands-on review because the pseudo-isometric image did not match the shipping 2D playfield; retained for provenance only and excluded from wheel, Windows, and web payloads

generated_environment_atlas.generation_prompt: Create one original clean 16:9 production concept sheet for a modular near-future stealth-facility tileset: separated 32 px-grid top-down three-quarter floor, wall, corner, door, window, trim, office, lounge, laboratory, server, security, vault, and utility assets; dark navy and steel with restrained cyan, amber, and red accents; consistent perspective and practical silhouettes; perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, glow, text, logos, watermark, characters, weapons, overlaps, cropping, or copyrighted franchise references.
generated_environment_atlas.human_cleanup: Chroma-key removal, alpha-edge validation, 1672x941 release atlas, explicit crop metadata, nearest-neighbor runtime scaling, bottom-pivot QA, and procedural fallback verification

generated_character_security_atlas.generation_prompt: Create one original clean 16:9 Ghostline character and electronic-security pixel-sprite sheet on a perfectly flat #ff00ff chroma-key background: separated top-down three-quarter cyan runner direction and idle/run/dash/link/damage poses; red-accent unarmed human guard directions and patrol/suspicious/chase/tackle-strike poses; violet response-drone direction/charge/recoil variants; and active, suspicious, disabled, and damaged wall-camera variants. Use practical readable 24-32 px silhouettes, consistent scale, bottom pivots, navy/steel materials, no background shadows or gradients, no text, logos, watermark, weapons, blood, environment tiles, or copyrighted references.
generated_character_security_atlas.human_cleanup: Chroma-key removal with the installed imagegen helper, despill, alpha-edge validation, 1672x941 release atlas, explicit crop/direction metadata, mirrored direction completion, nearest-neighbour runtime scaling, bottom-pivot and state-readability QA, and procedural fallback verification

generated_diagonal_locomotion_atlas.generation_prompt: Create a regular 4x4 production pixel-art sprite sheet matching the Ghostline character atlas: four northeast runner frames, four southeast runner frames, four northeast guard frames, and four southeast guard frames; consistent pivots, scale, identity, alternating contact/passing/recoil/airborne poses, and a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background with no shadows, grid lines, text, weapons, logos, watermarks, or extra objects.
generated_diagonal_locomotion_atlas.human_cleanup: Chroma-key removal with the installed imagegen helper, despill, alpha-edge inspection, per-frame crop metadata, nearest-neighbour runtime scaling, mirrored northwest/southwest completion, deterministic frame timing, direction-preserving procedural fallback, and logical-canvas QA

gameplay_screenshots.source: Deterministic Ghostline renderer and project-owned runtime assets
